children.text: You don't need extra warmup sets yet because your 5×5 weight is light. Once you must Squat 30kg for 5×5, do extra warmup sets with the weights and reps described on this screen. For now, Squat 5×5 10kg immediately.

You don't need extra warmup sets yet because your 5×5 weight is light. Once you must Overhead Press 30kg for 5×5, do extra warmup sets with the weights and reps described on this screen. For now, Overhead Press 5×5 20kg immediately.

You don't need extra warmup sets yet because your Deadlift weight is light. Once you must Deadlift 70kg for 1x5, do extra warmup sets with the weights and reps described on this screen. For now, Deadlift 1x5 40kg immediately, you're already warmed up from Squats and OH press anyway.
